title: Senior Frontend Developer at SigTuple South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at SigTuple South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Join the SigTuple South Asia Partners family as a Frontend Developer in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About SigTuple South Asia Partners:
SigTuple South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SigTuple South Asia Partners!
